title: B.Sc. (Hons. with Research) Biomedical Science - 4 years
content: Biomedical Sciences is the branch of the science that deals with the study of biological sciences and medical sciences. The B.Sc. (Hons. with Research) Biomedical Science is an interdisciplinary program, concerns with the topics to understand the biological principles that govern the functioning of the human body to discover the mechanism of any disease and to find new and distinct ways to cure a disease by developing advanced diagnostic tools or new therapeutic strategies. This 4 years undergraduate programme is suitable for those students who are interested in Biomedical Sciences and have a scientific bent of mind along with interest in experiments. This course is designed to provide students with a broad understanding of the scientific basis of human health and disease, covering basic aspects of cell and molecular biology, anatomy, physiology etc. This 4 years graduation program specially inculcates research abilities in students to pursue their career in research and allied areas. XIIth with PCB with minimum 50% marks. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) Biomedical Science Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 01 The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the world of biomedical science concepts through application based learning. 02 The graduates will be emphasized on applied aspects of advance biomedical techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude. 03 The graduates of biomedical science will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing, continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organization. 01 Disciplinary Knowledge and Problem Analysing: The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the biomedical science concepts through application-based learning and to apply the knowledge in analyzing the problems related to various fields of medical sciences for their solutions and enhances overall development and also equip with advanced biological techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude with problem solving skills. 02 Formulation and Design: The graduates will be trained to handle the advanced techniques of biomedical sciences to formulate the solutions of variety of problems related to the real life and will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing and continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organizations. XIIth with PCB with minimum 50% marks. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks.
